arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ، حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، سَمِعْتُ الْبَرَاءَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ آخِرُ سُورَةٍ نَزَلَتْ بَرَاءَةَ، وَآخِرُ آيَةٍ نَزَلَتْ ‏{‏يَسْتَفْتُونَكَ ‏}‏

english.text:
The last Sura that was revealed was Bara'a, and the last Verse that was revealed was: "They ask you 
for a legal verdict, Say: Allah's directs (thus) about those who leave no descendants or ascendants as 
heirs." (4.176)

chapter.english: Prophetic Commentary on the Qur'an (Tafseer of the Prophet (pbuh))
